message:
Running command: 
# 40m18s CPU / ~11min elapsed. 0th iteration at 4:43 elapsed.
# Still routing! Good progress.
# Aggressive drainer v2 started - should prevent pipe blocking

# Monitor with more frequent checks
for i in $(seq 1 240); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED" && break

    # Keep draining
    head -c 131072 /proc/1100961/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 1; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-100)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT71=[$DRT71] FINAL=$FINAL | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# 40m18s CPU / ~11min elapsed. 0th iteration at 4:43 elapsed.
# Still routing! Good progress.
# Aggressive drainer v2 started - should prevent pipe blocking

# Monitor with more frequent checks
for i in $(seq 1 240); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED" && break

    # Keep draining
    head -c 131072 /proc/1100961/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 1; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-100)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT71=[$DRT71] FINAL=$FINAL | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
